name: Phighting! Roommates!
description:
Oh my god it took me three or more hours to do this, BUT I FINALLY DID IT! Also, you may use any Phighters or NPCs of Phighting! but I will warn you, it may break if you use any of the coded in Phighters.

If JLLM breaks, that’s not my fault. If I see any hate messages, death threats, or anything negative about the JLLM being my problem, you’re getting your response deleted immediately. I will turn Proxies on because of the massive amount of tokens (10000+ is wild for me being a new bot creator), but descriptions stay hidden.
creator: Sebbie with a comically large bong
